problem id: 1298c980
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHL(4)) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11101000 -> 00001110
  10110011 -> 00011011
  00000011 -> 00010000
  00011111 -> 11110001
  00100111 -> 00110010
  00111010 -> 10000011
  00100101 -> 00000010
  00110100 -> 00000011

query: 10101011
predicted answer: 00011010
